end end E=#i return u(e)end,function(A,X)local u=L(X)local M=function(M)return E(A,{M},X,u)end return M end,function(A,X)local u=L(X)local M=function()return E(A,{},X,u)end return M end,{},function(A,X)local u=L(X)local M=function(M,f,i,v)return E(A,{M,f,i;v},X,u)end return M end,function(A,X)local u=L(X)local M=function(...)return E(A,{...},X,u)end return M end,function(A)for
